raw_body:
EMAIL US

FULLY INSURED MAN AND VAN BRIGHTON

From delivering single pieces of furniture to the contents of an entire household, our man with a van removals service offers a fast, efficient and great value moving service.

How can we help you today?

Budget Man with a Van Brighton and Hove

Welcome to Mark Ratcliffe Man and Van service, working with residents and businesses in Brighton and Hove for over 30 years. We offer a budget man and van service that operates 7 days a week with no extra charge for weekend moves. From small moves, bedsits, flats, collection / delivery of individual items all the way to long distance moves – our local team of movers are on hand to help. Working predominantly within the Brighton and Hove area, our local man and van staff have an in-depth knowledge of the local area and the wider area of East Sussex. We know the quickest routes to ensure your possessions are collected and delivered fast and efficiently.

Unlike other man and van companies out here, we supply high quality vehicles equipped with the latest technology to ensure a seamless journey and complete protection for your belongings:

  • Van tie rails and webbing to secure your goods
  • Furniture covers which are thick quilted pads for protection in transit
  • Tool box for the dismantling / assembly of furniture pieces
  • Loading ramps
  • Sack truck for moving heavy items
  • Tail lift vehicle if required
  • Various size packing boxes for those last minute household effects that need packing
  • Mattress, sofa, arm chair protective covers
  • Portable wardrobe cartons to keep your clothes clean and crease free

What are the costs of our Man and Van service?

Our rates are extremely good value and whilst we offer affordable prices this never means compromising on our highly rated, professional service. We offer two options:

Man and Van with working driver - £40 per hour / Man and Van with driver only - £30 per hour (you load and unload the van)

All prices are inclusive of vat and fuel (local area) and there is no additional charges for weekend Moves. With such affordable rates, this removal option is also ideal for collection and deliveries.

Need help packing? We offer that too!

We provide a full packing service and a fragile packing option for single, delicate items. Alternatively, if you are self packing then we can supply flat pack boxes, plain paper, bubble wrap, tape etc...all at a minimal cost and these can be collected from our shop.  

Self storage services in Brighton     

If you are interested in locating a storage facility where you can personally store your goods and collect them with ease, then we have the perfect solution. Our secure self storage rooms are available to rent with various sized units to choose from. Our most popular is the 77 sqft unit (equates to 850 cubic feet / 24 cubic metres). This room is rented at £30 plus vat per week and with our rooms being much higher than local competitors with charges over 50% less - you receive fantastic value for money. Your valuable belongings will be stored in a safe, damp free and clean environment with great access for loading and unloading, with you being the only key holder.

For professional removals Brighton look no further

Whether you are relocating in Brighton or further afield in East or West Sussex, our professional and low cost man and van removal service is ready to assist. Call our friendly team for a free quote or if you simply need some advice on your Brighton removals we can help with that too.

Our opening hours are Monday to Saturday 08:30 to 17:00 or by appointment on Sundays. For our self storage clients this is a 24/7 service.
